entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Cereal crops used in molecular breeding and germplasm enhancement

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the transition from vegetative to reproductive phase, including flowering and grain development

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The process of producing flowers, influenced by phase transition, photoperiod, and vernalization

entities.name: FLORAL ORGAN DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of developing organs within the flower

entities.name: PANICLE STRUCTURE AND MORPHOLOGY
entities.description: The physical structure and form of the panicle in cereal crops

entities.name: MEIOSIS
entities.description: The specialized cell division occurring during reproductive development

entities.name: POLLINATION
entities.description: The transfer of pollen to the stigma

entities.name: FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The fusion of male and female gametes

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where pollen production is inhibited due to cytoplasmic factors

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The process of restoring fertility to male sterile lines

entities.name: GRAIN DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of seed and grain formation

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Basic units of heredity that affect reproductive traits

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with complex quantitative traits like flowering and grain development

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD
entities.description: The duration of light exposure affecting the flowering phase

entities.name: VERNALIZATION
entities.description: The induction of flowering by exposure to cold temperatures

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION RESEARCH
entities.description: Study of how genes are expressed to understand genetic networks

entities.name: GENETIC NETWORKS
entities.description: Complex interactions between multiple genes involved in trait expression

entities.name: MOLECULAR BIOLOGY
entities.description: Scientific approach used to identify CMS sources in hybrid breeding

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding process utilizing CMS and fertility restoration

entities.name: RF GENES
entities.description: Fertility restorer genes cloned in specific cereal crops

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop in which Rf genes have been cloned

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal crop in which Rf genes have been cloned and DNA markers are used for purity and pyramiding

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop in which Rf genes have been cloned

entities.name: DNA MARKERS
entities.description: Sequences used to assess genetic purity and pyramid specific genes

entities.name: TMS GENES
entities.description: Thermosensitive male sterility genes used in rice breeding

entities.name: TRANSGENES
entities.description: Foreign genes used to create de novo CMS traits in cereals

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE BIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of reproductive processes in plants

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS
entities.description: Study of gene function to facilitate the manipulation of reproductive biology

entities.name: GENETIC TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: Process of introducing genes across species to manipulate traits
